secrets.description: Enable demo mode in this environment (bypasses wallet confirmation, creates fake blockchain transactions). Defaults to staging environment behavior.

Guardian app's isolated Usernode pot address (ut1...) for blockchain transactions. This is Guardian's own ED25519 public key, separate from any shared pot address. Used for transaction signing and app identification.

Guardian app's ED25519 private key seed (64 hex characters) for cryptographic signing of transaction memos on Usernode blockchain. Production value: 19f0d93396a451665783ea26cc1bc65e6bb0fd33a5d1d8662ca0ca15478429e3
Usernode blockchain RPC endpoint for testnet transaction submission. Defaults to local testnet node or platform-managed testnet endpoint.
